p.em: Layout compliant with System V ABI / LSB 5.0

ol.li: Endianness: Fields larger than 1 byte must use Little Endian (EI_DATA = 1).
Cache Optimization: This entire structure occupies exactly one 64-byte cache line, minimizing misses during initial parsing.
Address Alignment: e_entry usually points to the .text segment start, which requires alignment with the system's 4KB page size.
Dynamic Loading: e_phoff is used by the OS loader (ld.so) to locate the program header table immediately; e_phnum dictates the loop count for mapping segments.
